---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like it to work. Include CLI syntax, config changes, or behavior changes if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is your proposal better?

## Security Implications

Does this feature change the attack surface, require new permissions, or affect isolation guarantees? If yes, describe the threat model impact.

## Additional Context

Links, references, or prior art.
